new_terms.context: Refers to the major cloud service providers (AWS, Google, Azure) that customize hardware.
The assembly level involving full rack integration, cabling, and testing.
The final deployment level involving cluster-level setup and data center integration.
Contract manufacturers like Quanta or Foxconn that build custom hardware for hyperscalers.
A collaborative design and manufacturing model between the vendor and the hyperscaler.
Refers to the specific hardware configurations managed in the logistics chain.
